title: A Data Research: Analysis of the Effectiveness of Hazardous Waste Processing Industry Using Overall Equipment Effectiveness (OEE) and Six Big Losses at PT ABC
author: Victor Koes Nugroho, Gunawan
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This study aims to analyze the effectiveness value of the hazardous and toxic waste management industry system, which was conducted at PT ABC, located in, West Java, in October-December 2023. The research method used involved field surveys and historical data analysis. This research combines quantitative and qualitative methods. The measurement of effectiveness is conducted quantitatively by assessing Overall Equipment Effectiveness (OEE), which involves identifying, analyzing, and calculating based on existing data from incineration process activitiy. Once the OEE score is obtained, the next stage is to conduct an analysis root cause quantitatively using the Six Big Losses method and Pareto Analysis so that the root cause of the problem and the largest contributor to the company's losses will be obtained.
steps_raw: This study aims to analyze the effectiveness value of the hazardous and toxic waste management industry system, which was conducted at PT ABC, located in, West Java, in October-December 2023. The measurement of effectiveness is conducted quantitatively by assessing Overall Equipment Effectiveness (OEE), which involves identifying, analyzing, and calculating based on existing data from incineration process activitiy. Once the OEE score is obtained, the next stage is to conduct an analysis root cause quantitatively using the Six Big Losses method and Pareto Analysis so that the root cause of the problem and the largest contributor to the company's losses will be obtained.
